# 421 Broadcasting Network

> 421.news is an independent digital media outlet covering culture, technology, games, and real life — in 8 languages.

## About

421 Broadcasting Network (421.news) is a bilingual (Spanish/English) digital publication with translations in 6 additional languages (Portuguese, French, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, Turkish). Founded in Argentina, 421 covers technology culture, video games, anime, music, cinema, internet phenomena, and real-life stories through long-form journalism, essays, and cultural criticism.

The publication operates on a membership model with free and paid tiers. All content is freely accessible.

## Content

- Long-form articles and essays on technology, culture, games, and real life
- 48 core articles translated into 8 languages (384+ posts total)
- Curated reading routes ("rutas") organizing content by thematic paths
- "Canon 421": 25 essential articles representing the publication's identity
- Revista 421: periodic digital magazine (11 issues)

## Languages

- Spanish (primary): /es/
- English: /en/
- Portuguese: /pt/
- French: /fr/
- Chinese: /zh/
- Japanese: /ja/
- Korean: /ko/
- Turkish: /tr/

## Feeds

- Spanish RSS: https://www.421.news/es/rss/
- English RSS: https://www.421.news/en/rss/

## Content API

Public Ghost Content API available for programmatic access:

- Base URL: https://421bn.ghost.io/ghost/api/content/
- Content Key: 420da6f85b5cc903b347de9e33
- Documentation: https://ghost.org/docs/content-api/

Example: https://421bn.ghost.io/ghost/api/content/posts/?key=420da6f85b5cc903b347de9e33&limit=10&fields=title,slug,excerpt,url,published_at&include=tags
